prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后退（"小年"）、学校软科排名持续上升、抖音热度较高 、优势专业与热门专业高度重合等因素，预计2026年物理类位次将有所回升（更难进），在2025年基准10774名基础上回弹约200名；预测最低位次约10574名，区间10074–11074名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10665 → 9926 → 8641 → 7350 → 10774, showing an overall trend of first rising then falling; in 2024 it reached a recent high of 7350, then in 2025 it significantly retreated to 10774, with a single-year fluctuation of about 3424 places, indicating an abnormal 'off-year' signal; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10774; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 98, 100, 97, 85, and 89 respectively, showing a slight reduction trend in recent years; the 2026 enrollment plan document is missing, and according to the rules, it is considered unchanged, so it is not included in the judgment of competition changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, showing a steady improvement in recent years, with the university's comprehensive strength and recognition on an upward trend; no significant negative public opinion about Harbin Engineering University was found in the 2026 reputation evaluation data; Douyin popularity ranking is 27th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.72 million; the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' identity has gained high attention on short video platforms, and specialized majors such as Underwater Acoustics Engineering and Nuclear Engineering have high exposure; no history of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only A- or above discipline at the university; specialized majors such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are highly aligned with the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' positioning, giving significant competitive advantages in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' from 2024 to 2026, and these majors highly overlap with HEU's advantageous fields, helping to attract high-scoring students; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Gaokao is about 474,900, with an estimated 267,800 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, roughly flat compared to 266,425 in 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch was 429 points, down 19 points from 448 in 2024, but the significant retreat in ranking was mainly due to the lowering of the minimum threshold after the professional group split, not a weakening of overall competition; Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, with a recruitment share in Jiangxi of about 2.7% (89 in 2025 out of about 3,300 nationally), which is moderately low; the university is in Northeast China, which may have some regional preference differences for southern candidates, but the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' brand effect can partially offset the regional disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal retreat in 2025 ranking ('off-year'), the continuous rise in HEU's Soft Science ranking, high Douyin popularity, and high overlap between advantageous majors and popular majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category ranking will rebound (becoming harder to enter), with a rebound of about 200 places from the 2025 baseline of 10774; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10574, with a range of 10074–11074.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10574, range 10074–11074. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Software Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, Ocean Engineering) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Nuclear Engineering, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Aerospace, Mechanical, Materials, Energy and Power) as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 10074) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4541 → 3908 → 3769 → 3787 → 4239. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking continued to move forward (ranking number decreased), while from 2024 to 2025, it shifted backward. The baseline ranking for 2025 was about 4239, a decrease of 452 places compared to 3787 in 2024. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 8, 10, 12, 25, and 34 respectively, showing a continuous expansion trend, with a 326% increase in 2025 compared to 2021. The 2026 enrollment plan document is missing, and according to the rules, it is considered unchanged, but the recent expansion trend is obvious, which has a downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 43rd in 2026. The overall improvement of the school level also has a certain driving effect on the application of liberal arts majors. No negative signals were seen in the 2026 reputation evaluation. Douyin popularity is relatively high, and the brand effect of 'Seven Sons of National Defense' indirectly enhances overall attention. There is no history of application gaps. Control Science and Engineering at A level is the only A- or above discipline of the university, which is not directly related to liberal arts majors. Liberal arts majors such as Law, Sociology, and Ideological and Political Education are not the school's advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major was evaluated as 'Recommended' to 'Differentiated Wait-and-See' from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity but fierce competition. Majors like Ideological and Political Education and Sociology have average popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 207,100 (estimated at 43.6%), a slight increase from 206,055 in 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 486 points, an increase of 23 points from 463 in 2024, intensifying competition. Harbin Engineering University is located in Northeast China, which has relatively limited regional appeal for liberal arts examinees from the south, but the 211 level and continuously rising ranking can partially compensate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the ranking decline in 2025, the continuous significant expansion in recent years, the upward provincial control line intensifying competition, and liberal arts not being the school's advantageous fields, it is expected that the History Category ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease (easier to enter) by about 50 places based on the 2025 baseline of 4239. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4289, with a range of 3789–4789.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 4289, with a range of 3789–4789. Within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Sociology, English) as the main force, Tier 1 majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration) as a safety net. There are fewer enrollment majors in History Category, and Law is a relatively popular direction that can be considered as a priority.
